category_sources: Official Tomcat documentation describes Apache Tomcat as a Servlet/JSP container for developing and deploying web applications and services.
source_facts.description says it implements Java Servlet and JavaServer Pages.
display_name_sources: Official documentation and source pages use Apache Tomcat.
source_facts.homepage is the Apache Tomcat site.
docs_sources: Official Tomcat 11 documentation index is the dedicated documentation surface for the packaged major version.
source_facts.homepage is the official Apache Tomcat project site.
repo_sources: Official Apache Tomcat Repository Access page says tomcat.git contains the Apache Tomcat source code and provides GitHub as a web-based view.
tags_sources: Official Tomcat docs describe Servlet, Pages, Expression Language, WebSocket, and web application deployment support.
source_facts.description identifies Java Servlet and JavaServer Pages implementation.
